summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Precision Craft V2 redesign. All 16 requirements tested with 61 individual test cases - ALL PASSED. Mobile template shows new PC design tokens, semantic HTML with aria-labels, accessible FAQ, new Local SEO and E-E-A-T sections, dark sticky bar with Same-Day micro-label. Desktop unchanged with original ApplianceRepairPageNew template.
critical_code_review_comments: PC design tokens properly implemented replacing old C object
<main> tag with role='main' and aria-label wraps entire component
All sections have appropriate aria-labels for accessibility
FAQ uses aria-expanded, aria-controls, and role='region' for accessibility
NEW Local SEO section with 9 SF neighborhoods in 3-col grid
NEW E-E-A-T Technician block with 72x72 photo, credentials, and 3 tags
Sticky bar has dark navyMid background with Same-Day micro-label on Book button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Precision Craft V2 complete. All 16 redesign requirements verified: semantic HTML, hero with background image and trust badges, common issues 2-col grid without emojis, brands with inverted logos, how it works with step cards, NEW Local SEO section, NEW E-E-A-T technician block, reviews with dark cards, pricing with NO HIDDEN FEES badge, accessible FAQ, final CTA with Schedule Today, dark sticky bar with Same-Day micro-label. Desktop shows ApplianceRepairPageNew unchanged. Maintenance pages show 'service' instead of 'repair'.

main_tag_semantic.details: <main> tag with role='main' and aria-label wraps entire component

hero_background_image.details: Hero has background image at opacity 0.15 with gradient overlay

hero_pricing_block.details: $60 inline block with 'Applied to any repair if proceeding'

hero_book_button.details: BOOK button with aria-label='Book appliance repair service online'

hero_call_button.details: CALL button as <a> tag with border

hero_sms_link.details: SMS link with aria-label='Text FixitBay to schedule service'

common_issues_left_border.details: 3px solid orange left border on pills

how_it_works_step_cards.details: Step cards with orange circle, orange left border, navy background

local_seo_neighborhoods.details: All 9 neighborhoods: Castro, SOMA, Mission, Noe Valley, Pacific Heights, Sunset, Richmond, Marina, Hayes Valley

local_seo_view_all.details: 'View all service areas →' link with data-testid='view-all-areas'

eeat_credential_tags.details: 3 credential tags: Licensed & Insured, 10+ Years Exp., Same-Day

reviews_italic_text.details: Review text is italic with color rgba(255,255,255,0.85)

pricing_checklist.details: 4 checklist items with PC.white70 text color

faq_button_aria.details: FAQ button has aria-expanded='false' and aria-controls='faq-answer-0'

faq_toggle_symbols.details: Toggle shows + when closed and − when open

faq_answer_region.details: FAQ answer has id and role='region'

final_cta_button.details: Book button with aria-label, no boxShadow

maintenance_service_text.details: $60 block shows 'Applied to any service if proceeding'

global_montserrat_font.details: Montserrat font on all headings, buttons, and links
